Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Kristina A. Pico, Esq., appearing for Defendant/moving party:Peggy Kwong-Ming Ching
Wesley Wakeford, Esq., appearing for plaintiff/opposing party: Lorena Alarcon-Norman

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Alarcon-Norman's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena Issued To Kinry & Associates, LLC is granted. There is no good cause for the invasion of privacy that would result from producing the requested documents, and there is no showing that they would be relevant to the alleged abandonment or Dr. Ching's possible distraction from the practice of medicine at or about the time of the alleged malpractice. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers In Re Deposition Of Nancy Do And For Sanction Against Joseph C. Gharrity, Eaq.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Steven Taxman, Esq., for Lorena Alarcon-Norman, Plaintiff/Moving Party (telephonically)
Joe Garriety, Esq., for Peggy Kwong-Ming Ching, M.D., Defendant/Opposing Party (telephonically.

Tentative Ruling adopted after telephonic oral argument on 2/8/07, Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers In Re Deposition Of Nancy Do is granted. The court finds that the questions do not go to financial worth. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
